name: mooncut-studio
description: MoonCut Studio — local-first professional desktop editing workstation

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mooncut/studio-shared && npm run build -w @mooncut/studio-project-format && npm run build -w @mooncut/studio-bootstrapper && npm run build -w @mooncut/studio-agent-host && npm run build -w @mooncut/studio-desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mooncut/studio-shared && npm run typecheck -w @mooncut/studio-project-format && npm run typecheck -w @mooncut/studio-bootstrapper && npm run typecheck -w @mooncut/studio-agent-host && npm run typecheck -w @mooncut/studio-desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mooncut/studio-shared && npm run test -w @mooncut/studio-project-format && npm run test -w @mooncut/studio-bootstrapper && npm run test -w @mooncut/studio-agent-host && npm run test -w @mooncut/studio-desktop
